zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas d'Audley於1258年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland38歲，母親Ela de Longespée35歲。他於1287年10月23日與Katherine de Giffard在英國格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1299年8月28日在英國格盧斯特斯爾享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文巴恩斯塔普爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas d'Audley于1258年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland38岁，母亲Ela de Longespée35岁。他于1287年10月23日与Katherine de Giffard在英国格盧斯特斯爾布利普斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1299年8月28日在英国格盧斯特斯爾享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文巴恩斯塔普爾。

nameMeanings.name: d'Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas d'Audley was born in 1258, in Staffordshire, England, his father, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, was 38 and his mother, Ela de Longespée, was 35. He married Katherine de Giffard on 23 October 1287, in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 28 August 1299, in Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Barnstaple, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas d'Audley est né en 1258, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Ela de Longespée, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Katherine de Giffard le 23 octobre 1287, à Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 août 1299, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Barnstaple, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas d'Audley 1258 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland 38 und seine Mutter Ela de Longespée 35. Er hat am 23. Oktober 1287 in Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England Katherine de Giffard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. August 1299 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Barnstaple, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas d'Audley è nato il nel 1258 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Ela de Longespée, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Katherine de Giffard il 23 ottobre 1287, nel Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 agosto 1299, nel Gloucestershire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Barnstaple, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas d'Audleyが1258年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父James de Audley Justiciar of Irelandは38歳，母Ela de Longespéeは35歳であった。1287年10月23日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリンプスフィールドでKatherine de Giffardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1299年8月28日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンバーンスタプルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas d'Audley(이)가 1258년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela de Longespée(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1287년 10월 23일 영국 그루스스터실르 브림프스필드에서 Katherine de Giffard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1299년 8월 28일 영국 그루스스터실르에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 바른스타플에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas d'Audley nasceu em 1258, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Ela de Longespée, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine de Giffard em 23 de outubro de 1287, em Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1299, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas d'Audley родился в 1258 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Ela de Longespée, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine de Giffard 23 октября 1287 г. в местности бримпсфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 августа 1299 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности барнстапл, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas d'Audley nació en 1258, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Ela de Longespée, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Katherine de Giffard el 23 de octubre de 1287, en Brimpsfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1299, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Barnstaple, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
